parsed_output.justification: Justin’s statements are contradictory and rife with misinformation—first claiming to be a Robber, then stating he was a Drunk and even claiming to be a Werewolf. Such inconsistent behavior is typical of a player trying to conceal that they are a Werewolf. His claims suggest he swapped into a role that could easily be a Werewolf and later tried to deflect by saying he was “probably a Werewolf” because he was drunk. Because no other player showed any clear sign of being the unknown Werewolf, Justin is the most probable werewolf to vote for.
